messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to give you a quick update on the backend migration project.

We're currently at 80% completion and everything is progressing well. We remain on track for delivery by Friday as planned.

Please let me know if you have any questions or need further details.

Best regards

content.delta: The email has been sent successfully to **alice@example.com** with the subject **"Project Update"**. It summarises that the backend migration is **80% complete** and **on track for Friday delivery**. Let me know if you'd like to make any changes or send any follow-up emails!
